# truenas_iscsi_target (Data Source)

Provides information about an iSCSI target on TrueNAS SCALE.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "truenas_iscsi_target" "example" {
  id = 1
}

output "iscsi_target_name" {
  value = data.truenas_iscsi_target.example.name
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (Number) The numeric iSCSI target ID to look up.

### Read-Only

- `alias` (String) Optional alias for the target.
- `groups` (Attributes List) Target groups linking portals and initiators. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--groups))
- `mode` (String) The target mode (ISCSI, FC, BOTH).
- `name` (String) The iSCSI target name (IQN suffix).

<a id="nestedatt--groups"></a>
### Nested Schema for `groups`

Read-Only:

- `auth` (Number) Auth group ID.
- `auth_method` (String) Authentication method.
- `initiator` (Number) Initiator group ID.
- `portal` (Number) Portal ID.
